textByHash.012c1842a240fdaed05352f2284ae584b006d7cf: Yes, it looks like I can...
textByHash.02a65e4bc2a2401d5a7330faa2d94bd9feabd91c: While I'd love to sell you some, I'm afraid you need to do some more charting first.
textByHash.15df15fb79069f85b1181bf9999cc431240191ee: They're a bit of an interesting one. On your travels, you may spot some sealed crates floating in the sea.
textByHash.1a26a23a7d4f36fc55cae63efad23fccaaf7764a: Just remember not to keep following the wind forever, or you'll just keep going around in circles!
textByHash.2159fa2f9235fe96aa9fcee565fb86e8eefe6ecc: I've been told before that drinking it also helps you catch more fish when out deep sea trawling.
textByHash.2f2373beae3f7601d7d1ac18a927796c48ca28b6: They're a bit of an interesting one. It's been argued that they're not actually completely essential for charting the sea, but Steve thinks otherwise. Probably best you talk to him if you want to know more.
textByHash.3440a0aada2d82c3b5a34b65adfe2e4751f554cf: So, as you can now see, I am very much the man to speak to about this sort of thing.
textByHash.360554b5e29f3a3f4885c9c141526c3c5b9b3ede: Indeed. It's a bit unusual, but who am I to judge! Anyway, apparently she's aquired a portable weather station, a very fine piece of equipment for measuring weather data.
textByHash.36f7bf2f0a600dcd36ba61648d32254910267c76: I made sure to include some big hints in there about the things you might find on your sailing adventures.
textByHash.39f90ba5171350924981a72c764da23062927afd: It will probably make more sense if you head out and discover the art of tracking currents for yourself!
textByHash.3d9c5e67f6b9141ee024437ba7389e0c8c85b30b: Ah, they say perildance bitter is the best drink you'll find for a sailor who likes to get themselves into a fight or two. It will supposedly improve your strength, along with your sailing and ranging abilities.
textByHash.437015db0906cdca7d30c494f94488ef57ba891e: Anyway, I'm pleased to say that you've done enough charting for me to sell you some! Would you like to buy a glass to sample it? Or do you want enough to fill a keg?
textByHash.45d4b728000a4eb09879f309b3f0c8073c3ef630: To track them, you'll need to make use of your good friend, the current duck! Specifically, once you've found some currents you want to track, you'll want to let your current duck head out for a swim.
textByHash.4610fee3ef1d2a12e41157e21888554e2d3841c8: Well, it's a bit of an odd one, but I've been told there's a troll who has started working as one recently.
textByHash.48bc7db000220161e4464d0aeacb167b1d7885fa: Good day! What can I do for you?
textByHash.49265adfb6aa2aa6b18f2f5daf0a46ba52db39fe: It's also been said that these crates add a bit of much needed danger to the whole charting effort.
textByHash.4a9287bc73d70294d6f914fb7d249485f12a6a41: Absolutely! Understanding the various currents around the seas is essential. As you sail around, you'll likely spot many currents of potential interest.
textByHash.4bfdee361e62300b06a36b6b51ce4b65b9bddd99: Ah, for that, you'll need to go diving. However, you don't want to rush it. You'll need to make sure you're skilled enough for that sort of thing before you... dive in.
textByHash.501ef1451a35fafbc0b129a02fe945d7943553d8: Well, as the name suggests, trawler's trust is the drink you want if you're planning to head out trawling. It's said to improve both your sailing and fishing abilities.
textByHash.532a3aebf4868a9cbb589878b6260bfb9740590c: We had someone passing through recently who said that Arhein in Catherby was looking to track some currents. I'd suggest you go and speak to him.
textByHash.53c8171d50879d14fdc2774522c44621dbc0bc7a: That said, the starting point is always going to be your captain's log. I actually helped author the standard log that we give out around the Pandemonium.
textByHash.5976d3c9f887732fcdf6c6f13b4c171a217f2540: I hear they will guide you for a price, and for some inexplicable reason, that price seems to be solving a word-based puzzle for them.
textByHash.598c3b6ab41ba18089a5d3f6f0f3938ec629efb5: Ah, for that, you'll need to go diving. Doing so will let you take a record of the sea depth, but it's also great for learning more about the local underwater flora and fauna.
textByHash.5e3febd9c5fa0308eb42c3f18eadc1b5b8d740dd: You can use the weather station to work out the wind direction. If you follow it for a bit, you should be able to work out which way the circle is curving, and from that, you should be able to find the eye.
textByHash.60f3bc87789146c1fe872f268d8e11ee095aa1c9: Ah, that I can do indeed. You see, I am a map maker extraordinaire.
textByHash.6483999d89ef5ac4e790416c838ac34b59939d97: Sorry, but it doesn't look like you have anything in here that I don't already know.
textByHash.67eb3d0e1c2d2f175d05189840d6d477f8138ea3: Here, I have a spare spyglass you can have.
textByHash.68b91ff397112610c7ab4711b0ef825ff94bee78: Well, the more you know about the sea, the more you'll be able to take advantage of it. Specifically, learning about the seas will offer the discerning captain a shortcut or two.
textByHash.6b708183314a2e4452601a650a2cb3a232b13bd9: Well, kraken ink stout is the perfect drink if you consider yourself a bit of a magical sailor as it's said to improve both your sailing and magical abilities.
textByHash.6d6c068d9c4cfc5d0ed9627eb68ac03fcb0c3182: You are quite welcome to use it to admire me from afar!
textByHash.755f6da9ea2cbce3b02d84820c0d98651e0a096e: Ah, the old classic. In many ways, there's nothing too fancy about horizon's lure. It's quite simply the perfect drink when all you care about is sailing.
textByHash.76dace8382ef84e27f8c43692f9b911f1a136c53: Charting these things is simple. All you need to do is just make a note of them as you find them!
textByHash.79692702822049af37c79d96d4f0f7dc16a00fc6: Absolutely! As you become more familiar with the sea, you will likely start to notice rapid flowing waters where you hadn't before.
textByHash.798762401d76bb857f3e80819f3009bcdf3c289c: If you come across this troll, she'll hopefully allow you to use this weather station for yourself.
textByHash.7cdc5b927488421c407efb170166e2b62215057f: Don't let this fool you. It takes more than eyes to make a map. They named the mapping book after me, you see...
textByHash.84bcfaeebe0e6b55fd1065284ffa8088c7d601a8: Many claim that it also increases the likelihood of encountering interesting things while out at sea. I'm not sure how a drink does that, but the world works in strange ways.
textByHash.8609f5c26b0530dd6f300a0c47d381a51a533943: Anyway, once you reach the eye, you can use the weather station to take the readings you need. After that, just make sure to return the weather station to the troll.
textByHash.896ccf7f9d6312de633bbff25b3d5a2bd648ba7b: Finally, in return for charting information, I can offer some training that will help you improve your sailing abilities. Just let me know any time you completely chart an ocean.
textByHash.8b41ba8720b9492da49e273a3d57be4d4f9b1644: Well, what you'll find is that the wind typically blows in large circles. What you need to do is find the middle of this circle, or the eye as we often call it.
textByHash.8b5e4b2a2809df56819b3642b0c01ed2811cd068: Hello there. I'm afraid I only talk to proper sailors, and I can see you're not quite at that level yet. However, you are welcome to admire me from afar.
textByHash.936a92c1286905a0e4e6e9172777cca5f13373af: Assuming you have a strong enough helm on your boat, sailing over them should give you a noticable speed boost!
textByHash.9746af2e8ca8cfc9d22c8a505a0e61cd3b8ce816: Other than the thrill of exploration?
textByHash.994db711480ab4dff792f2055e78f98f3bae2026: Oh, on second thoughts, it doesn't look like you have anything in here that I don't already know.
textByHash.99673c7b76f598745249079b0f18f551adba5689: Of course! I simply can't think of any alternatives!
textByHash.9b55c7a1148db54bc14d375d887ced281c9f8bcd: Be careful though, as some of them can be a tinge on the ripe side...
textByHash.9b64edc595136e89602e30a0bd061e427fb7e662: Ah, for that, you'll need the right tool. Well, I suppose in this case, it's less of a tool and more of a friend.
textByHash.a0aba77659a847f6bdc33c0575ab8a3681598d82: He'll track the currents for you, so all you need to do is follow him wherever he goes. Once he's done, just pick him up again and let him share what he discovered with you.
textByHash.a9c51849264e91e7db097e195f0dc6817c491b08: That can take a bit of practice, but if you pay close attention, you might find some very subtle, definitely not obvious signs of where the best places are...
textByHash.ac29f10e6035f919316039ebc617000b9d636198: But that's not all, for plenty of sailors also claim that a bit of perildance bitter has helped them out of a tight spot by improving their ability to man their boat cannons.
textByHash.ae87a8895daffd202de31590f6799f3cf73d1b87: Of course! There's the kraken ink stout, the perildance bitter, the trawler's trust, and of course, the horizon's lure! Which do you want to hear more about?
textByHash.b25b2b1f57307301c3dd3bb7508e21cf2a24c55f: However, I wouldn't reccomend going it alone. Fortunately, a lot of mermaids have been popping up recently, interested in the extra sea traffic.
textByHash.b3ca098d74d06a77fb21e55ce8a2a0f1c04f6f0b: Ah, for them, you'll want to find a good spot and use a spyglass to take it all in.
textByHash.b900947d51258ae00f282d72bb94e63c8da7de08: There you go! Enjoy! Now, are you interested in any other drinks?
textByHash.bbe1e80003d0222e8bbd5d072bf30482d8985b30: And for the less discerning captain, I have a stock of alcohol I'd be willing to part with for up to date charting information, along with some coins of course.
textByHash.bd06f92bcef33ba96e5f889985c4ef29d2bb2907: Well, you'll likely spot some interesting things in the sea and on some of the less explored islands that you find whilst out sailing.
textByHash.befa930f355a030030d1a2a4fc772b3a93b7a0fd: Not only is it said to make you a better sailor, but it apparently also helps you improve your sailing abilities faster.
textByHash.c9a20e4147d35e2f1c2549798c724e09d26eed2d: Very well. Would you like me to tell you about a different drink?
textByHash.cc463f8923faf57acf8e87ab6a9e9054f81fb707: Well, you have both big and small points of interest, water currents, sea depths, weather patterns, and then there's also drink crates. They're a curious one that Steve likes people to track.
textByHash.cf7e03abcb1151a41dc009c4b58080a686bdbb79: My observational skills are not what they used to be after all!
textByHash.cf93e56dfec72bd334d2ffbaa87c0b17ce160a09: Well, that very much depends. You see, when it comes to charting, there are quite a few different things you'll want to track. What you need to do is going to vary depending on what it is you're tracking.
textByHash.d22fa5adba021034a95224a3ffd9b9eab99cd327: That's Spot. He's my seeing eye parrot. Say hello, Spot!
textByHash.d35d56d1b1f1bf5e9c6ab285cc0d4ddc2c136cb3: Of course! All good captains need to have a strong understanding of the weather out at sea. However, to do it well, you'll probably want to enlist the help of a meteorologist.
textByHash.dc0cb58adebfcad6953ce160e0aa07027ed14e6a: Once you find one, just pry it open with your crowbar. If you're lucky, there will be a refreshing beverage inside for you to try.
textByHash.eb0de7aad65f4572b73104890866f12c0a4261b0: So, what specifically would you like to know about charting?
textByHash.eeb09330cbaa84860d8c0b4c70cf3a842e6870e5: Would you like me to tell you about a different drink?
textByHash.ef3293bffea1b1896c78689c09d633293f50e2b7: Yes, that opinion has come up before. However, according to Steve, it's an unwritten rule in this world that alcohol is the key to solving all problems.
textByHash.f5710d8a2c8d8c82c3a19be4a9af58a704fb2598: Afraid he's mute. He hasn't talked for a good long time, but he still finds ways to express himself.
textByHash.f778be507eab3976f52b948d3e21fca17381f34c: Well, all good captains need to have a strong understanding of the weather out at sea. However, it requires a fair bit of skill to do it well. I'd suggest you wait until you're more experienced.
textByHash.f903076c9dcd04af00599876a75d703e2a5203c0: Indeed, so get your thinking cap on... under your diving gear of course. It's very important you don't forget that.
textByHash.ff347ac17f2207e69a053be82eec8083cb1df490: Even I can see you don't have space to hold that, and just to be completely clear, I am totally blind!
